name: ethernium-agentops-mcp

tools.name: agentops.scan_text
tools.description: Classify untrusted text for prompt and secret-like risk.

tools.name: agentops.scan_path
tools.description: Recursively scan a file or directory using AgentOps ignore rules.

tools.name: agentops.check_capability
tools.description: Validate a requested capability and optional path.

tools.name: agentops.estimate_budget
tools.description: Estimate token usage against a selected model profile.

tools.name: agentops.pack_context
tools.description: Create a compact context bundle under a token budget.

tools.name: agentops.route_model
tools.description: Recommend a model/provider path without invoking the model.

forbidden: invoke models before scan and budget controls exist
